case_title: WONG, GIM HON VS ANORUO, ARINZE JR.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANORUO, ARINZE JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, GIM HON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANORUO, ARINZE JR. $1,261.30 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,336.30, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE + LOSS OF USE IN THE SUM OF $411.30; AND GENERAL AND SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY IN THE SUM OF $850. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT ANORUO, ARINZE JR.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WONG, GIM HON AS TO DEFENDANT ANORUO, ARINZE JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
